title: Unique 31502EU Eco-Friendly Square Paper Plates-18 cm-Red Colour-16 Count (Pack of 1), Pack of 16
features: Pack of 16 Square Red Party Plates
Square paper plates measure approximately 18 cm x 18 cm
Ideal for serving cake at a birthday party or Christmas party
Combine with other red party supplies from Unique Party
description: Product Description Make your after party clean-up simple without sacrificing style when you use these eco-friendly square red paper plates. Convenient for serving small party foods, cake, and other desserts, these red plates are ideal for your Christmas party, Valentine's day party, wedding, and more. Disposable plates make cleaning up after the party is over really quick and easy. As these plates are 100% plastic free, the great news is they are better for the environment too! Safety Warning No warning applicable
